headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock on Our Watchlist and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: Tapestry Adds Pinterest CTO To Board To Sharpen Digital Retail Focus
summary: Tapestry (NYSE:TPR) has appointed Matt Madrigal, Chief Technology Officer of Pinterest, to its Board of Directors. Madrigal brings experience in technology and e-commerce from roles at Pinterest, Google, and eBay. Tapestry, the owner of lifestyle brands such as Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman, continues to focus on digital engagement and younger consumers. The addition of Madrigal reflects the growing importance of online discovery, social commerce, and data-driven marketing for...
